summary: Miraculous transfer of a cassette‑recorded show – clarity decent but tape cuts present.
review: The original source was a 60‑minute chrome cassette, so the audio has modest clarity and suffers from occasional drops caused by the tape. The community’s restoration work is praised as “miraculous,” delivering a listenable version despite those imperfections, and the reviewer gives the recording a full five stars.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it is overwhelmingly positive about both the performance (by implication) and especially the quality of the transfer, leading to a high rating with moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded on 60‑min chrome cassette; clarity better than typical audience tapes but suffers from tape‑induced cuts/dropouts. Transfer work praised as excellent.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments about the musical flow or set structure were provided.
